scenarios.description: HTML doc with existing <meta charset> and obsolete <meta name=charset> updates meta[charset] and removes obsolete
scenarios.precondition: Document.createShell and doc.outputSettings().updateMetaCharsetElement(true); head has both meta[charset] and meta[name=charset]
scenarios.expectedResult: meta[charset] attribute updated to new charset and meta[name=charset] removed
pseudocode: TEST TC10 update existing html meta and remove obsolete

scenarios.description: XML doc with existing XmlDeclaration name="xml" lacking version attr adds encoding but leaves version absent
scenarios.path: B0→B1(true)→B2(html)→B3(syntax=xml)→B9(xml branch)→B10(get first child)→B11(node instanceof XmlDeclaration)→B12(name==xml)→B13(hasAttr version false)→B14(set encoding only)→B15(return)
scenarios.precondition: Document.createShell, syntax xml, prepend XmlDeclaration("xml") with no version attr
scenarios.expectedResult: XmlDeclaration gets encoding updated to new charset and no version attr is added
pseudocode: TEST TC11 xml decl without version retains no version

scenarios.description: HTML doc with only obsolete <meta name=charset> appends new meta[charset] and removes the obsolete element
scenarios.precondition: Document.createShell with head containing only meta[name=charset]
scenarios.expectedResult: new meta[charset] appended and original meta[name=charset] removed
pseudocode: TEST TC12 append html meta when only obsolete present
